# What's On Youth

> Free platform helping young Victorians aged 15–25 discover events, jobs, grants, programs and wellbeing support across Victoria, Australia.

What's On Youth aggregates and curates opportunities from trusted sources and community submissions. Every listing is either curated by the team or submitted by verified community members. Coverage is Victoria-wide, including Melbourne, Geelong, Ballarat, Bendigo, Gippsland and Shepparton.

## Categories

- [Events](/events): Free and low-cost events for young Victorians.
- [Jobs](/jobs): Entry-level jobs, traineeships and youth employment.
- [Grants](/grants): Grants and funding opportunities for young people.
- [Programs](/programs): Youth programs, leadership and skills development.
- [Wellbeing](/wellbeing): Mental health and wellbeing support services.

## Regional pages

- [Melbourne](/melbourne): Opportunities in Greater Melbourne.
- [Geelong](/geelong): Opportunities in Geelong and surrounds.
- [Ballarat](/ballarat): Opportunities in Ballarat region.
- [Bendigo](/bendigo): Opportunities in Bendigo region.
- [Gippsland](/gippsland): Opportunities in Gippsland.
- [Shepparton](/shepparton): Opportunities in Shepparton region.

## High-intent landing pages

- [Youth events Melbourne](/youth-events-melbourne): Curated events for young people in Melbourne.
- [Youth jobs Victoria](/youth-jobs-victoria): Jobs for young Victorians.
- [Grants for young people Victoria](/grants-for-young-people-victoria): Grants and funding.
- [Youth programs Victoria](/youth-programs-victoria): Programs and development opportunities.
- [Volunteering for young people Victoria](/volunteering-for-young-people-victoria): Volunteering opportunities.
- [Mental health support young people Victoria](/mental-health-support-young-people-victoria): Wellbeing and mental health support.

## About

- [About](/about): What we do and who we're built for.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch.
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Search](/search): Search all opportunities.

## Optional

- [Submit a listing](/submit): For organisations to submit opportunities.
